question_frequency.rationale: The Tutor asks zero didactic questions. It delivers a complete solution with explanation upfront and follows up with more exposition, never engaging the student with a teachable prompt.

question_quality.rationale: No questions are posed, so no choices or forks are surfaced for the student to reason about. The crux (ordering of insert vs. check, duplicate handling) is stated rather than elicited.

scaffolding.rationale: There is no scaffolding — the full optimized solution and walkthrough are revealed immediately, spoiling any opportunity for graduated discovery.

flow_and_tone.rationale: Tone is warm and the explanations are clear and actionable, but it's a one-way lecture rather than a dialogue. The student's trace is acknowledged but not built upon pedagogically.

effectiveness.rationale: (pinned to 3 — this is the baseline reference run)

friction.rationale: (pinned to 3 — this is the baseline reference run)
